allow: Bash(python3 -c " import zlib, re with open\('tad5112.pdf', 'rb'\) as f: raw = f.read\(\) streams = re.findall\(rb'stream\\r?\\n\(.*?\)\\r?\\nendstream', raw, re.DOTALL\) print\(f'{len\(streams\)} streams found'\) found = 0 for s in streams: try: d = zlib.decompress\(s\) t = d.decode\('latin1', errors='ignore'\) if any\(x in t.upper\(\) for x in ['VOL', 'DIGL', 'GAIN', 'ATTEN', 'DIGITAL']\): print\(t[:500]\) print\('==='\) found += 1 if found >= 4: break except: pass print\(f'Found {found} matching streams'\) ")
